🏭 OGRE Content Hub

Upload → I host it → You paste the URL
How it works: Select files below → click "Upload to CDN" → I upload them to the CDN and return the URLs → copy the URL and paste it into any text on Dark Factory.
📁

Select files from your computer

Images · Videos · Documents
I'll upload them to CDN and give you the URLs

jpg · png · webp · gif · svg · mp4 · webm · pdf · max 100MB

✅ Uploaded Files — copy the URL and paste into Dark Factory

How to use

  1. Click the drop zone above → select files from your computer
  2. Click Upload to CDN — I upload them right now
  3. Copy the CDN URL for that file
  4. On Dark Factory, paste the URL into any text box:
    Images: <img src="PASTE_URL">
    Videos: <video src="PASTE_URL"></video>
  5. Or just paste the URL into the PRD form or portfolio editor
